title: GOLIATH
description:
PHOTOSENSITIVTY WARNING: This game contains flashing imagery and intense strobe effects. These features can be disabled in the in-game settings.

You already know how this story ends.GOLIATH is an arcade-style twin-stick boss-rush bullet-hell with an emphasis on scoring.

Titans are invading Earth attempting to claim it as their own, the last hope for humanity is a single soldier. Blast away bosses and dodge complex attack patterns, all the while improving and upgrading your character.

Features• 25 unique bosses, dealt out boss-rush style

• An arsenal of devastating weaponry and augments that make every run unique

• Arcade-style scoring that encourages replay-ability, along with an online leader-board to compete with friends and others

• A codex to fill and achievements to earn, for dedicated completionists and casual players alike

• Full controller support, along with couch co-op support for up to two players
description_short: Twin-stick boss-rush bullet-hell with an emphasis on arcade-style scoring. Blast away Titans and dodge exciting attack patterns, all the while improving and upgrading your character. Compete with friends online for the high score, or grab a buddy and fight together in couch co-op.
